name: MiniRte

unions.name: Rte
unions.comment: The rich text editor. [Under the hood](https://github.com/dkodaj/rte/blob/master/src/MiniRte/Core.elm?plain=1#L71), it is a record type that tracks cursor position, selection, formatting etc.

values.name: addContent
values.comment: Add content at current cursor position.

values.name: addCustomHtml
values.comment: Embed a custom html node within text.

values.name: addImageWithSrc
values.comment: An `img` node with the specified `src`.

values.name: addLink
values.comment: Turn the current selection into a link.

values.name: addText
values.comment: Insert text at current cursor position.

values.name: content
values.comment: The edited content of the RTE.

values.name: copy
values.comment: Copy current selection. Results in a `ToBrowserClipboard` Msg which must be captured in `update`. See the [example](https://github.com/dkodaj/rte/blob/master/example/src/Main.elm).

values.name: decodeContentGZip
values.comment: Convert gzipped content json into edited content.

values.name: decodeContentString
values.comment: Convert content json string into edited content.

values.name: encodeContentGZip
values.comment: Encode the edited content in a gzipped json string.

values.name: encodeContentString
values.comment: Encode the edited content in a json string.

values.name: fontFamily
values.comment: The font-family (set with [toggleFontFamily](#toggleFontFamily)) at the cursor position.

values.name: fontSize
values.comment: The font-size (set with [setFontSize](#setFontSize)) at the cursor position.

values.name: freeze
values.comment: Hides cursor and stops listening to mouse and keyboard events.

values.name: init
values.comment: The string you pass in is an `id`, which must be unique.

values.name: makePastedLinksClickable
values.comment: Control whether pasting something that begins with with `http(s)://` becomes a clickable link. Default is `False`.

values.name: replaceContent
values.comment: Clears the editor and loads new content.

values.name: replaceContentString
values.comment: Same with plain text.

values.name: setCharacterLimit
values.comment: Prevent typing more than a certain number of characters. There is no default limit, but the RTE becomes increasingly slow for longer texts (>10-12K characters).

values.name: setFontSize
values.comment: Controls the font size within the selected text / at the current cursor position.

values.name: setFontSizeUnit
values.comment: Defaults to `px`.

values.name: setHighlighter
values.comment: See [MiniRte.Types](/packages/dkodaj/rte/latest/MiniRte-Types) on highlighters.

values.name: setIndentUnit
values.comment: Defaults to `(50,"px")`. Matters when you use [increaseIndent](#increaseIndent) or [decreaseIndent](#decreaseIndent).

values.name: setSelection
values.type: ( Basics.Int, Basics.Int ) -> MiniRte.Rte -> ( MiniRte.Rte, Platform.Cmd.Cmd MiniRte.Types.Msg )

values.name: setSelectionStyle
values.comment: Controls how selected text looks. Defaults to `[("background","hsl(217,71%,53%)"), ("color","hsl(0,0%,100%)")]`.

values.name: showContent
values.comment: Display, in an uneditable div, the content generated by the RTE.

values.name: showContentCustom
values.comment: Same with some parameters.
values.type: { fontSizeUnit : Maybe.Maybe String.String, indentUnit : Maybe.Maybe ( Basics.Float, String.String ), highlighter : Maybe.Maybe (MiniRte.Types.Content -> MiniRte.Types.Content) } -> MiniRte.Types.Content -> List.List (Html.Attribute MiniRte.Types.Msg) -> Html.Html MiniRte.Types.Msg

values.name: showContentCustomStyled
values.type: { fontSizeUnit : Maybe.Maybe String.String, indentUnit : Maybe.Maybe ( Basics.Float, String.String ), highlighter : Maybe.Maybe (MiniRte.Types.Content -> MiniRte.Types.Content) } -> MiniRte.Types.Content -> List.List (Html.Styled.Attribute MiniRte.Types.Msg) -> Html.Styled.Html MiniRte.Types.Msg

values.name: showEncodedContent
values.comment: Same but using a json generated with [encodeContentString](#encodeContentString).

values.name: showEncodedContentCustom
values.comment: Same with some parameters.
values.type: { fontSizeUnit : Maybe.Maybe String.String, indentUnit : Maybe.Maybe ( Basics.Float, String.String ), highlighter : Maybe.Maybe (MiniRte.Types.Content -> MiniRte.Types.Content) } -> List.List (Html.Attribute MiniRte.Types.Msg) -> String.String -> Html.Html MiniRte.Types.Msg

values.name: showEncodedContentCustomStyled
values.type: { fontSizeUnit : Maybe.Maybe String.String, indentUnit : Maybe.Maybe ( Basics.Float, String.String ), highlighter : Maybe.Maybe (MiniRte.Types.Content -> MiniRte.Types.Content) } -> List.List (Html.Styled.Attribute MiniRte.Types.Msg) -> String.String -> Html.Styled.Html MiniRte.Types.Msg

values.name: subscriptions
values.comment: Doesn't do anything when the RTE is [freeze](#freeze)d.

values.name: textContent
values.comment: The plain text content of the RTE.

values.name: textarea
values.comment: Show the RTE.

values.name: toggleFontFamily
values.type: List.List String.String -> MiniRte.Rte -> ( MiniRte.Rte, Platform.Cmd.Cmd MiniRte.Types.Msg )

values.name: toggleHeading
values.comment: Turns the current paragraph into an `h1` element.

values.name: turnPastedImageLinksIntoImgElements
values.comment:
When you paste an image link `x`, it becomes an img element with `src=x`.
Something qualifies as an image link iff it starts with `data:image/` or it ends with `.jpeg`, `.jpg`, `.gif`, `.png`, `.apng`, `.svg`, `.bmp`, or `.ico`.
Defaults to `False`.

values.name: unfreeze
values.comment: Show the cursor and activate mouse/keyboard listeners.

values.name: unlink
values.comment: Remove the `href` at the current cursor position.

name: MiniRte.Types
comment:
@docs Msg, TextAlignType


# Writing highlighters

A highlighter is a `Content -> Content` function that you can inject into the model using `setHighlighter`.
The function should modify the `highlightClasses`, `highlightIndent`, or `highlightStyling` fields of the elements.
Each string `x` in `highlightClasses` turns into `Html.(Styled.)Attribute.class x`.
Each `(x,y)` in `highlightStyling` turns into `Html.(Styled.)Attribute.style x y`.
Attributes of `LineBreak`s apply to the paragraph (the previous non-linebreak elements) as a whole.

@docs Content, Element, CharacterRecord, EmbeddedHtmlRecord, emptyEmbeddedHtml, LineBreakRecord, Child, FontStyle

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment:
`CharacterLimitReached` allows you to get notified if too much text is entered.

`FromBrowserClipboard` and `ToBrowserClipboard` can be used to handle copy/pasting text from the RTE to other apps and vice versa. See the [example](https://github.com/dkodaj/rte/blob/master/example/src/Main.elm).

`InternalMsg` is not part of the API.

aliases.name: CharacterRecord
aliases.type: { char : Char.Char, fontStyle : MiniRte.Types.FontStyle, highlightClasses : List.List String.String, highlightStyling : List.List ( String.String, String.String ), link : Maybe.Maybe String.String }

aliases.name: EmbeddedHtmlRecord
aliases.comment: You can embed any html node using this type. The RTE will only be able to delete or copy/paste these elements.
aliases.type: { attributes : List.List ( String.String, String.String ), classes : List.List String.String, children : List.List MiniRte.Types.Child, highlightClasses : List.List String.String, highlightStyling : List.List ( String.String, String.String ), nodeType : Maybe.Maybe String.String, styling : List.List ( String.String, String.String ), text : Maybe.Maybe String.String }

aliases.name: FontStyle
aliases.type: { classes : List.List String.String, fontFamily : List.List String.String, fontSize : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Float, styling : List.List ( String.String, String.String ) }

aliases.name: LineBreakRecord
aliases.type: { classes : List.List String.String, highlightClasses : List.List String.String, highlightIndent : Basics.Int, highlightStyling : List.List ( String.String, String.String ), id : String.String, indent : Basics.Int, nodeType : Maybe.Maybe String.String, styling : List.List ( String.String, String.String ), textAlign : MiniRte.Types.TextAlignType }

values.name: emptyEmbeddedHtml
values.comment: An empty div.
